mnemonics: Convolutional Neural Networks: Cats Never Nap (Convolution, Non-linearity, Pooling)
keyPoints: Convolutional Layer: Applies filters to extract features like edges and textures.
Pooling Layer (e.g., Max Pooling): Reduces spatial dimensions for computational efficiency and to control overfitting.
Fully Connected Layer: Uses the high-level features for final classification or prediction.
commonMistakes: Using padding='valid' (no padding) and losing information at the image borders.
Applying too much pooling too early, which can discard important feature information.
Forgetting to add a Flatten layer to convert the 3D feature maps into a 1D vector before the fully connected layers.
